utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: She said what ?

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: She said , " If I am not gonna be happy getting married somewhere that we find in a day , well then we should just postpone it . "

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Postpone it ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Emily , do you think Monica realises how much our parents spent on this wedding ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Do you my sister teeny ... tiny little brain comprehends that people took time out of their lives to fly thousands of miles to be here , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: This is not right .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: I realize that people are going to be disappointed . But , I am sure they will come back when we can do it right .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I can not ask people to do that ? Would you ask people to do that ?

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Do not you point your pants at me !

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: We have no choice !

emotion_cause.span: 11_Anywhere that is half ... decent would have be booked months ago

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Anywhere that is half ... decent would have be booked months ago , Ross do not you understand ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_Anywhere that is half ... decent would have be booked months ago

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: This is our wedding I am talking about .

emotion_cause.span: 11_Anywhere that is half ... decent would have be booked months ago

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: The only thing I understand is postponing it is not an option . This is when we are getting married .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: So what are you saying ? It is now or never ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_The only thing I understand is postponing it is not an option . This is when we are getting married .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No . I am saying it is now .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Or ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_The only thing I understand is postponing it is not an option . This is when we are getting married .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: There is no or in mind . What is wrong with these pants ? ! !

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: It is not the pants .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: It is you that is backwards .

emotion_cause.span: 20_you do not understand how important this is to me

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: And if , and if you do not understand how important this is to me , well then , perhaps we should not get married at all !

emotion_cause.span: 20_you do not understand how important this is to me

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , wait ! Emily ! No , wait , stop ! Emily , please ...
